/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/arp_tool.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arp_tool.dir/src/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arp_tool.dir/src/ArpCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arp_tool.dir/src/ArpSender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arp_tool.dir/src/ArpStatistics.cpp.o -o arp_tool  /opt/homebrew/lib/libPcap++.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libPacket++.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libCommon++.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework SystemConfiguration /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libpcap.tbd
